---
title: "Tier 2 — Pre-Algebra & Algebra I"
subtitle: "Grade 8–9 · planned, not yet built"
---

::: {.callout-note}
This tier is **planned but not yet authored.** See [`_curriculum.yml`](/_curriculum.yml)
for the topic plan and the [Home page](/index.qmd) for build status.

The curriculum is built **depth-first**: Tier 1 must hit the quality bar
before Tier 2 begins.
:::

## Planned scope

Linear equations and systems · functions as machines · exponents and
scientific notation · the Pythagorean theorem · polynomials and factoring ·
similarity and scale.

[← Back to Home](/index.qmd) · [Tier 1 — Foundations](/lessons/tier-1-foundations/index.qmd)
